# services.gerbil

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.gerbil`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.gerbil.environmentFile` | `null or absolute path` | Path to a file containing sensitive environment variables for Gerbil. See the [Gerbil Documentation](https://docs.fossorial.io/Pangolin/Configuration/config) for more information. These will overwrite anything defined in the config. |
| `services.gerbil.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Specifies the port to listen on for Gerbil. |
